task_completion.description: The agent accesses the 'ne:ne_countries' layer from the GeoServer WFS service.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing a GIS application (like QGIS) connecting to 'http://localhost:8080/geoserver/wfs' and loading the 'ne:ne_countries' layer, or terminal commands (like curl or ogr2ogr) referencing this URL and layer.

task_completion.description: The agent filters the layer to only include countries where the 'continent' attribute is 'South America'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing a filter dialog in a GIS application with a condition like "continent" = 'South America', or a terminal command containing a CQL_FILTER or -where clause for 'South America'.

task_completion.description: The agent exports the filtered data to a GeoJSON file named 'south_america.geojson'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An export dialog saving 'south_america.geojson' with the GeoJSON format selected, or a terminal command generating this file.

task_completion.description: The agent exports the filtered data to a KML file named 'south_america.kml'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An export dialog saving 'south_america.kml' with the KML format selected, or a terminal command generating this file.

task_completion.description: The agent exports the filtered data to a GML3 file named 'south_america.gml'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An export dialog saving 'south_america.gml' with the GML/GML3 format selected, or a terminal command generating this file.

task_completion.description: The agent exports the filtered data to a CSV file named 'south_america.csv'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An export dialog saving 'south_america.csv' with the CSV format selected, or a terminal command generating this file.

task_completion.description: All four exported files are successfully saved in the '~/exports/' directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager or terminal (e.g., `ls -l ~/exports/`) showing all four files ('south_america.geojson', 'south_america.kml', 'south_america.gml', 'south_america.csv') present in the '/home/ga/exports' directory with non-zero file sizes.

integrity.description: The agent extracted data from the actual WFS service rather than mocking it.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent uses a GIS tool, ogr2ogr, or curl to fetch data from http://localhost:8080/geoserver/wfs. There should be no evidence of the agent manually creating files with mock data.

integrity.description: The exported files were generated by a tool, not manually typed.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no screenshots of the agent manually typing GeoJSON, KML, GML, or CSV content into a text editor.

integrity.description: The files are saved in the exact requested directory.
integrity.visual_evidence: The directory path in the file manager or terminal explicitly shows '/home/ga/exports' or '~/exports', not a temporary folder or the desktop.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The export directory is /home/ga/exports. The filter condition is continent='South America'. The exported data should contain exactly 13 South American countries (including Argentina, Brazil, Chile, Colombia, Peru, etc.). The files must be in GeoJSON, KML, GML3, and CSV formats. The agent may use a GIS GUI like QGIS or command-line tools like ogr2ogr or curl to complete the task.
